Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}Everyone I know is in a club, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}...I just can't be bothered to join one.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}They all say I'll make a lot of friends and all that, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}I can't understand why people are freaking out over those ghost stories.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}I mean, running around school screaming and spreading rumors...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}They all need to just grow up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}It's almost summer vacation.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}I used to love summer vacation when I was a kid...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}But now it's like, whatever. I just don't get excited about it anymore.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}Culture festival this, culture festival that...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}Everyone just loooves the culture festival![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}But not me, dude. I think it's a waste of time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}I hope there's a typhoon or something so they'll have to cancel it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}...Maybe that's a bit much, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}Wh-What!? I haven't done anything wrong![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}Wait, you're not here about... that?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}Phew... Don't scare me like that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}Yeah, that's right. No one has to know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}I... I mean, I did wish for the typhoon.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}I even hung voodoo dolls upside down with lots of needles stuck in their heads.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}But I didn't think a typhoon would really come! It was an accident![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}Man, Kirijo-san is impressive.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}Her dad just died, but she still went to a meeting about the future of the Kirijo Group.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}She's a real go-getter, that one.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}I wish I could be like that... Ah, who am I kidding? I like being lazy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}Dude, what's the deal with career experience?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}They made me carry cardboard boxes around all day...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}My arms are friggin' killing me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}Man... I don't feel like doing anything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}You know what I mean, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}It's like everything is this huge waste of time now... I think the world should just end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}But doing things is hard... How do you do it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}As long as you pass your exams, you'll be fine.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}But I never study for my exams 'cause I'm too lazy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}Last time I was hanging out at the strip mall, I saw a dude with a wild fashion sense.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}Long, wavy hair, no shirt, and tattoos all up and down his arms.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}I know it might be unseasonably warm, but he kinda went overboard...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}But hey, maybe it's cool to let your freak flag fly.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}If I was more like him, not givin' a rip what people think, I wouldn't have a care in the world.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}Everyone's making friends these days... I dunno. It seems like a lot of work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}I know there's an upside to having friends, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}I wish there was a way to do it without all that "bonding" stuff, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}Man, I'm so lazy these days.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}Think I've got that Apathy Syndrome thing?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}Yeah, I guess it's just plain ol' laziness.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}Dude, I was just kidding. Don't take it so seriously, man.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}H-Hey, I was just kidding![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}On hot days like this, you gotta go to the manga café. It's nice and cool, and you can read all the manga you want.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}They have PCs to access the Internet there, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}Oh, that reminds me... Sometimes I see this weird guy there...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}He's always banging away on that little laptop of his, muttering to himself...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}And he's always got that briefcase, too... Is he, like, a day trader or something?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}Isn't the town messy these days?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}Right? Right? The people are weird these days, too...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}I'm already lazy, but I think I'm going to get even lazier...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}Dude, you're messed up. Did something bad happen to you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}Man, school has started... I'm so lazy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}Why? Listen, I don't need a reason to be lazy. Besides, everyone gets like this after days off.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I heard some guy made friends with some workers, but isn't that a waste of time?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}I'm fine being a customer. I don't need to be "friends" too, you know?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}I mean, I'm sure there's an upside to it, but... I'll pass anyway.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}Dude, check this out. There's lazy people all over.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}What's going through their minds? Nothing, I guess...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}I'm so jealous, man. I wanna be just like them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}I'm already naturally lazy, so I've got a head start on achieving total blankness of mind![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}You sure see a lot of couples during summer vacation, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}Maybe I should get a girlfriend... It's a lot of trouble, though.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}Like just now, I saw a couple having an argument, and the girl was like...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}"I'm gonna report you to that revenge website!"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}What was she even talking about?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}Yep. You know me, man.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}But it's mainly 'cause I'm still stuck in summer vacation mode...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}Aww, c'mon. I'm not that bad.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}Sheesh, way to kill the conversation. Now I feel even lazier...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}That Aragaki guy died at the gang spot, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}Sometimes I'll aimlessly wander around there, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}I should quit doing that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}The people who believe in the End have at least some energy left...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}I mean, they have enough in them to believe in something, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 317}I don't even have that much, man. It's over for me.[n]{f 1 1}
